title: Washing Line Rope with Steel Core, 20m Heavy Duty Washing Line with 2 Tensioners, Strong Clothes Line for Indoor, Outdoor, Garden, Black
features: High Quality: Our strong washing lines outdoor is a good quality, strong, thick washing line that makes an excellent replacement on a rotary line. Clothesline rope length is 20m, and the diameter is 3mm, that can hold up to 200kg of pulling force. Sag resistant and designed to stand the test of time.
Easy To Install: The washing line can be cut to any length as you like. washing lines does have a strong steel core and you will need a pair of pliers or a wire cutter to cut through it.

Steel Core & PVC Cover: Washing line rope strong made with a strong steel core and strong PVC Cover, eliminating the possibilities of leaving dirty marks on your clothes.It has long lifespan to protect the outdoor washing line against all seasons of weather and ensures that the color will not fade after a long time using.
Length & Diameter: Clothesline length is 20m, and the diameter is 3mm, which is long washing line enough to meet your need of drying your clothes.
Widely Use - heavy duty washing line is not only perfect for hanging laundry outside, but also can be used as gardening wire cable, string lights hanging cable and farming support cable.
description: Product Description Long washing line is made of a strong and durable high-quality steel core. It has a long service life and you do not need to replace it frequently. The washing line outer layer is made of high-quality PVC coating, which is waterproof, weatherproof and easy to clean. Washing line suitable for gardens, outdoors, living rooms, balconies, courtyards and other places to dry clothes. Elevate your laundry routine with this heavy-duty washing line rope featuring a steel core for exceptional strength and durability. The PVC coating ensures a smooth and long-lasting finish, perfect for both indoor and outdoor environments, including gardens, it is a versatile solution for your drying requirements. With its sturdy tensioners, you can easily adjust the tautness of the line, ensuring your clothes dry evenly and wrinkle-free.
